zh: 神秘顧客，受雇暗中評估商店服務品質的人
en: My name is Bond, Jamie Bond, and I am a mystery shopper.
en_example: My name is Bond, Jamie Bond, and I am a mystery shopper.
zh_example: My name is Bond, Jamie Bond, and I am a mystery shopper.
ja: 覆面調査員、店舗のサービスを秘密裏に評価する人
ja_example: My name is Bond, Jamie Bond, and I am a mystery shopper.

en: I work for Nielsen and Nielsen's department store.
en_example: I work for Nielsen and Nielsen's department store.
zh_example: I work for Nielsen and Nielsen's department store.
ja_example: I work for Nielsen and Nielsen's department store.

en: This flyer says you have bags for sale.
en_example: This flyer says you have bags for sale.
zh_example: This flyer says you have bags for sale.
ja_example: This flyer says you have bags for sale.

en: That bag has a 20% discount on it.
en_example: That bag has a 20% discount on it.
zh_example: That bag has a 20% discount on it.
ja_example: That bag has a 20% discount on it.

en: How much is this tote bag?
en_example: How much is this tote bag?
zh_example: How much is this tote bag?
ja: トートバッグ、大きな手提げ袋
ja_example: How much is this tote bag?

en: You get an extra discount if you sign up for a free membership here.
en_example: You get an extra discount if you sign up for a free membership here.
zh_example: You get an extra discount if you sign up for a free membership here.
ja_example: You get an extra discount if you sign up for a free membership here.

en: The membership will give you a coupon for an extra $10 discount.
en_example: The membership will give you a coupon for an extra $10 discount.
zh_example: The membership will give you a coupon for an extra $10 discount.
ja_example: The membership will give you a coupon for an extra $10 discount.

en: It's not a bargain, but still pretty good.
en_example: It's not a bargain, but still pretty good.
zh_example: It's not a bargain, but still pretty good.
ja: 掘り出し物、お買い得品
ja_example: It's not a bargain, but still pretty good.

en: Don't forget to give me a receipt.
en_example: Don't forget to give me a receipt.
zh_example: Don't forget to give me a receipt.
ja_example: Don't forget to give me a receipt.
